tokens: Hey, Joe, are you planning a mare stop on the way back?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we're standing by for a mark when you're rolling.
And we'd like for you to press on back towards the drill site.
We've got a procedure for you to separate two sections of the deep stem from the other two sections, and we're going to carry the two halves into the LM that way.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And the mare site, Dave; we will do a good mare site, but fairly near the LM.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Are you buckling up for safety?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: give it a turn and go by slow.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...right, and you might pick up your Rover tracks before long.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Oh, what a big mountain that Hadley is!
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Might want to swing a little more to the right, here, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me go around to the right of this...Sure we can get between those two craters ahead of us there.
Yeah, think I'll come this way.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yes, the mountains up here are truly beautiful.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We copy you loud and clear.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, now come to the right.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: That's a friendly shallow depression there at...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, we'll go south of that.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, it's just over hill and dale, isn't it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...eyes off the scenery and the road for a moment, I could explain the core-stem separation procedure, if you'd like it now.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I can give you the procedure now or we can wait until we get past...Oh, okay.
We think you can put the four sections of the core stem in the vise.
Jim, you move it horizontally, put horizontal torque on the stem and tighten it up in the vise, while, Dave, you use the wrench and try to separate it.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Well, we tried that, Joe, but we'll try it again.

That was just about what we tried the last time, by trying to put horizontal and vertical forces and everything else on the vise, and the vise just doesn't seem to grip like it should, not nearly as well as the wrench does.
And I don't really know why.
It might be a little loose.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It may also be that it's quite dusty, and the brush might help you out there.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And to set your minds at ease, we think that even if you can't separate it into two pieces, we can get the whole thing into the LM.
So we'll bring it home anyway.
We'd like it in two separate pieces, though.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Well, I guarantee you we're not going to leave it here now (laughing) after we got that much invested into it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We're looking directly east now as we head back to the LM...Did you put your visor down?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Haven't yet, but I think I just might.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, that Sun is really fierce.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And I can see, as I look to the east, several places up the slope [of]
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: One about a quarter of the way up directly east from us...That was Big Rock Mountain.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And the name of the mountain again, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) And do we have a big smile here in the MOCR.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'm not going in there, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Laughs) Haven't picked up our tracks yet...Think we're probably still a little north of them.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, look at the mountains today, Jim, when they're all sunlit; isn't that beautiful?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, I'm reminded of a favorite Biblical passage from Psalms.
"I look unto the hills, from whence cometh my help." But of course, we get quite a bit from Houston, too.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We've got to go around this...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: What's your estimate as to when we'll be able to see the LM?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, do you think we'll be able to see it at 1 kilometer?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...to be going up and down the valleys here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...No, I think I see the top of it, Dave; at 12 o'clock.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Just barely see the top of it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, well, you look far-range, and I'll look near-range.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And the Rover's (sic, means LM) a little black blob over there at about 12:30.
That's exactly where the Nav system says it is.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think we'd do better going straight ahead on, don't you?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We just got that one depression over that next ridge.
Might want to just drive through it, huh?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, let's see how we do it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Wasn't that the deep one, though, that had the crater in the lower part?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: It's saying (bearing) 093 and heading 08(0), so coming right's going to help us some.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: This is a better route than we used coming out.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Long Pause) Wish we could get that 16-millimeter camera to work.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: How about that for maneuvering, huh?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: This thing would really be great in shirtsleeves up here, you know it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, concerning that 16-millimeter camera, if you're changing the mag out, you might try the one-frame- per-second trick at the beginning.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Yeah, I did that this morning, Joe, on this mag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...didn't work; I'll try it again, though.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: By the way, do you want us to bring back those jammed mags or shall we chuck 'em?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, look at the few big boulders up there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It's appropriately named, don't you think?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) It's the only one around here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, we think it will be just as easy for you to bring them (meaning the 16-mm magazines) back, and we'll troubleshoot them.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Long Pause) You know, so far in the past, our Nav system has always been biased pointing us to the right a little bit more than we should, so I'm going to bias it a tad left here.
Because I know if we get too far left, we'll pick up our tracks.
I've noticed on the other two trips when we got back, it was asking us to head 8 degrees or so to the right.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: See our tracks running to the east there (at the) 12 o'clock position.
Just over that next ridge, we should...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, we cut a big chunk out.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It's no problem at all driving up-Sun, with the center visor down.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: In fact, I reckon we're making pretty good time.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: By golly, we must have come just about straight back.
And the bearing - yeah, it's great.- says 096, and I'm...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hey, let me take a picture right here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yes, let me stop on the rim here and point you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Swing it a little more to the right and let me make sure...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We'll go find the ALSEP site; I think we've been there before.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...I want you to notice how we planned the fourth stop...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: No, I don't think it was.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Hearing Joe; Laughs) Yeah, it's got to be a new all-time record.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Sure would like to do some more geology up here someday.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, we didn't get a chance to get up the Northern Complex and see Pluton, Icarus...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, the really big surprise was up there!
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Jim, I'll go around the north here and avoid the dust on our trusty ALSEP.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hey, that's...That's a pretty nice picture right there, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Swing around there, I'll take some.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: What kind of mag...Oh, you got black and white.
(Pause) Okay; there you go, right there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, I'll change it out when we stop.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I thought you left it in the erect position.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...arrive back at the drill site: Jim, why don't you hop off and pick up the three important items there: the drill stem, the treadle, and the wrench.
And, Dave, you can drive on back and park by the LM.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, give me your camera, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I'll just skip the navs (that is, the readouts).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let's see you have all the other stems in the bag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You have the wrench in there, too, don't you?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If it's not there, I've got it in the bag.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It's not here by the treadle.
So all I'll do is pick up the treadle?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I don't know why we need the treadle.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We might use it as a wrench.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Responding to Joe) Yeah, I guess you could.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And that's Walter Mitty plan number 2.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, I have the treadle (and) stems, and I'm heading back.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, I'm off the Rover (at the LM), Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: When I get up there, Joe, I'll give you the readings.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Long Pause) Dave, are you arriving at the LM, now?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Dave's been here for a couple minutes.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We're standing by for TV, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: The heading is 001, (bearing) 032, (distance driven) 5.1; (range) 0.0; (amp-hours remaining) 88, 90; (battery temperatures) 108, 113; and motor temps are still low.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (To Houston) Okay, AGC says you should have it, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, are you going to use that (Hasselblad) camera?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, 'cause I want to...We never have taken any dust pictures of the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Reading LMP-36) You need two cross-Sun and one down-Sun.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, also, I've got to take a photograph of the solar wind (experiment).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And we needs some help on our (TV) camera, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (To Houston) I guess we kind of follow the checklist here for a while, huh?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: But we want you to break down the core stem first, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: The crew'll break down; the stem never will.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay; I got a pan of the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: If you have that stem there.
Okay, keep going the way your going.
Don't bother with the treadle yet.
Let's...(Pause as Dave looks in the SCB on the back of the Rover) Oh, shoot!
You didn't see the tool out there?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No, all I saw was a (pause) UHT.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Must be in your seat, then.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Ah, shoot; I don't see it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'll whip out there (to the drill site) again.
But the only thing I saw was the UHT lying on the surface out there.
Did you have a UHT in that area?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: That's all that was out there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: But, you know, I thought I put the tool in the bag with the stems.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: How could it get out and the stems not get out?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: How many stems did you have?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I guess we'll have to use the treadle.
(Looking under the CDR seat) It's not in my side, either.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Want to hold it, and I'll get on the end there with the treadle?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: How am I going to get the treadle over the cap, though?
I'll have to come in from the other end.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: No, the other end's got the same kind of cap, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Don't guess it will hold with the cap on.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'll take the cap off and go gently.
I'll put the cap back on.
Which way should the treadle...That's right.
We'll never get the treadle off.
No, don't put the treadle on it.
We've got nothing to get it back off with.
Best thing...Joe, will this stem fit in the LM someplace.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think that's what we're going to do.
We're going to take the stem with us, just like it is.
I think if we try and fiddle with it, we're going to mess it up.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And our camera's turtled up again.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, I'm going to work with the 16(-mm camera) here and see what I can do.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Boy, I tell you, my hands (garbled) done.
Well, Joe, I just decided it was time to take that drill (stem) apart, and I took it apart.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: So, now we have a three-stem section and three one-stem sections.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we're standing by for a cap number on that...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And Golf on the single stem (garbled).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...and, Jim, we need some help with the camera.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hotel is the upper part of the three-stem section.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Those caps aren't on there very good, Jim, so gotta be awful careful of it (while taking the core stems into the LM cabin).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh, I see what you mean, yeah.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Dave, bag (SCB) 2 for that short section and, Jim, we need help on our TV camera, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: You try and get that 16-millimeter working.
(To Houston) You guys have almost lost control on this (TV) camera, haven't you?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It's okay, Dave; it's okay now.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: How far down do you want it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, I tell you what I need now is some Gatorade.
I could drink 3 gallons of the stuff.
I opened up my checklist here and look at all that work and that reminds me...(Pause)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hey, Joe, I have mag Golf on here now.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We need a EMU status check from both of you, and we're 5 minutes from closeout.
All we need is a few grab samples.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'm 3.85, flags are clear, and I'm reading 60 percent.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, troops, we're asking for the undocumented samples to go into...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Joe, it (meaning the 16-mm camera) sounds like it's running already at one frame per second.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We didn't catch that comment, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Rog, Jim, I'm sorry, I cut you out.
Asking that the undocumented samples go into the BSLSS bag.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hey, Joe, how about bag...Oh, well, okay.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Joe, when I start the (16-mm) camera it runs for about 3 seconds and then stops.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I can put on another mag, if you like.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think we should just go ahead with your other tasks.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And, Jim, we've got another question...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We would like a picture of the Rover saddle which hung up on original deployment.
Do you have one of those already?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: No, but I'll go get one, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we have everything in this bag that you're going to put in it, right?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: But how about the rocks under the seat?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'm going to put those in there.
That's why I wanted to get the right bag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Well, we've got an SESC in here that has not been used (and), of course, the remaining caps.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, I'm working on the bag 2, right now, Joe.
(Pause) Taking the caps out of it that we have not used.
We've got an SESC here that hasn't been used.
And then I'm putting (pause) the rocks and samples that are under my seat in bag 2.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, Joe; I got your picture of the saddle, a couple of them.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Did you document this large one, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, I'll try to get it in this bag, then.
(Pause) I think I'll wait and put that (meaning Great Scott) in the BSLSS bag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin
